title: A Commission with no enabled_builtin_tools surfaces the agent's built-in tools
description: enabled_builtin_tools omitted (None) means 'expose all': agent_started.data.avp.tools MUST enumerate the agent's built-in tool surface as a non-empty list. This is the positive complement to empty-allowlist-hides-builtins (which asserts []). Cross-agent the tool NAMES differ (claude: Read/Bash/...; goose: write/edit/shell/...) and the entries vary in richness (claude knows names but not authoritative descriptions, so emits name-only; goose emits the full name/description/inputSchema triple), so the only portable assertion is that the list is non-empty. Built-in tools dispatch locally, signalled by the ABSENCE of avp.mcp_server_id on each ToolDecl; the per-invocation avp.tool.dispatch_target=local discriminator on tool_invoked is exercised separately (needs a forced tool call, see BACKLOG).

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.

events.label: agent_started enumerates a non-empty built-in tool surface
